name: Rhubarb-Strawberry Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
FILLING: In a large bowl, combine sugar, flour, cinnamon, and orange rind. Add rhubarb and strawberries; toss well. Spread the mixture into a 13 x 9 inch (3.5 L) baking dish. Bake in a 400°F (200°C) oven for 10 minutes.
TOPPING: In another large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Using fingers or two knives, cut in margarine until the mixture resembles small peas. With a fork, stir in buttermilk just until a soft dough forms. Drop tablespoonfuls of the dough into 12 mounds on top of the hot fruit filling. Bake in a 400°F (200°C) oven for 25 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and has risen.
